description: Casual dressing only gets better with these suede desert boots from red tape. The updated classic look complements all casual and semi-formal wear. The design creates a perfect foundation for building a well-groomed look that exudes style and confidence.UpperSuede upper for maximum durability, breathability and styleHigh ankle design for enhanced comfort comfortLace-up system for a snug, customised FitSuede tongue for easy wearFabric inner lining for breathable comfortPadded footed for maximum breathability, sweat-free protection and all-day comfortMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with wave patterned grooves for maximum grip on smooth surfacesshoe careWipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
